Serialized Form

  • Package buttons

    • Class buttons.BinOpButton

      class BinOpButton extends CalculatorButton implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • op
          IntBinaryOperator op
          The binary operation associated with this button

    • Class buttons.CalculatorButton

      class CalculatorButton extends JButton implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • situation
          Situation situation
          The Current situation of the calculator

    • Class buttons.CancelButton

      class CancelButton extends CalculatorButton implements Serializable

    • Class buttons.DigitButton

      class DigitButton extends CalculatorButton implements Serializable

    • Class buttons.EqualsButton

      class EqualsButton extends CalculatorButton implements Serializable

  • Package general

    • Class general.GUI

      class GUI extends JFrame implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • canvas
          JPanel canvas
          Panels for display and keypad
        • display
          JLabel display
          The label used to display the input and output of the calculator.
        • keyPad
          JPanel keyPad
          The panel containing the keypad buttons of the calculator.
